nx_signature: (G, node_attributes, edge_attributes=(), prefix='Supernode-', supernode_attribute='group', superedge_attribute='types', *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)

name: soft_random_geometric_graph
fnx_signature: (n, radius, dim=2, pos=None, p=2, p_dist=None, seed=None, *, pos_name='pos', backend=None, **backend_kwargs)
nx_signature: (n, radius, dim=2, pos=None, p=2, p_dist=None, seed=None, *, pos_name='pos', backend=None, **backend_kwargs)

name: spectral_bisection
fnx_signature: (G, weight='weight', normalized=False, tol=1e-08, method='tracemin_pcg', seed=None, *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)
nx_signature: (G, weight='weight', normalized=False, tol=1e-08, method='tracemin_pcg', seed=None, *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)

name: spectral_ordering

nx_signature: (G, weight='weight', normalized=False, tol=1e-08, method='tracemin_pcg', seed=None, *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)

name: spiral_layout
fnx_signature: (G, scale=1, center=None, dim=2, resolution=0.35, equidistant=False, store_pos_as=None)
nx_signature: (G, scale=1, center=None, dim=2, resolution=0.35, equidistant=False, store_pos_as=None)

name: spring_layout
fnx_signature: (G, k=None, pos=None, fixed=None, iterations=50, threshold=0.0001, weight='weight', scale=1, center=None, dim=2, seed=None, store_pos_as=None, *, method='auto', gravity=1.0)
nx_signature: (G, k=None, pos=None, fixed=None, iterations=50, threshold=0.0001, weight='weight', scale=1, center=None, dim=2, seed=None, store_pos_as=None, *, method='auto', gravity=1.0)

name: stochastic_block_model
fnx_signature: (sizes, p, nodelist=None, seed=None, directed=False, selfloops=False, sparse=True, *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)
nx_signature: (sizes, p, nodelist=None, seed=None, directed=False, selfloops=False, sparse=True, *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)

name: subgraph_view
fnx_signature: (G, *, filter_node=<function no_filter at 0x777a4d317d80>, filter_edge=<function no_filter at 0x777a4d317d80>)
nx_signature: (G, *, filter_node=<function no_filter at 0x777a4d317d80>, filter_edge=<function no_filter at 0x777a4d317d80>)

nx_signature: (n, radius, theta, dim=2, pos=None, weight=None, p=2, seed=None, *, pos_name='pos', weight_name='weight', backend=None, **backend_kwargs)

to_latex_raw

nx_signature: (G, nodelist=None, dtype=None, order=None, multigraph_weight=<built-in function sum>, weight='weight', nonedge=0.0, *, backend=None, **backend_kwargs)
